hitl_criteria: Exported CSV opens in Excel without errors
WPF Export CSV button is enabled when 835 is loaded and disabled when 271 is loaded
completed_criteria: X835CsvExporter.Export produces header + one data row per SVC segment
Each data row contains parent CLP ClaimId and PatientName
CARC description column populated from interpreted document
Denied claim with no SVC produces one row with zero SvcBilled
CLI export on 835 fixture exits 0 with correct header and row count

hitl_criteria: Validation results appear in the WPF validation panel when an 835 is loaded
completed_criteria: X835Validator.Validate returns zero results for a well-formed 835 fixture
Missing BPR segment produces a validation result with a human-readable message
Invalid CAS group code produces a validation result
Non-numeric CLP03 (billed amount) produces a validation result
CLI validate on 835 fixture exits 0 and emits no errors
CLI validate on a malformed 835 exits non-zero and emits human-readable errors

hitl_criteria: Opening a 277 file in WPF renders the claim status tree
Pending and rejected claim nodes are visually distinguishable from accepted
completed_criteria: X277DocumentParser.ParseFile returns claims with ClaimId and STC status codes from the fixture
X277Interpreter.Interpret resolves STC01-1 category code F1 to Finalized
All four fixture scenarios produce non-empty plain-English status descriptions
